title: Add a local pre-commit hook that runs Build-WingetInstallScript.ps1 -Check
description: Mirror the CI drift guard locally: a pre-commit hook that runs the build -Check and blocks the commit if winget-app-install.ps1 is out of sync with the module. Coexist with the beads pre-commit hook already in .beads/hooks/.

title: Add Build-WingetInstallScript.ps1 -Check to the windows-tests CI workflow
description: Fail CI when the generated winget-app-install.ps1 drifts from the WingetAppSetup module. Add a step that runs 'pwsh -File ./build/Build-WingetInstallScript.ps1 -Check' in .github/workflows/windows-tests.yml so a stale committed bundle is caught on every push/PR.

title: Trial the beads ready->claim->close loop end-to-end
description: Verification bead for adopting beads (winget #147): exercise bd ready, bd update --claim, bd close, and bd dolt push to confirm the workflow works before relying on it.
close_reason: Verified ready->claim->close loop end-to-end during beads adoption (winget #147)

title: Document the generated-script drift guard in readme/CLAUDE.md
description: Once CI and the pre-commit hook enforce -Check, document the guarantee (generated winget-app-install.ps1 can never drift from the module) in readme.md and CLAUDE.md.
